description: Use this API to tabulate unbalanced fault solution output. It gives fault currents arriving at a bus. It must be preceded by the execution of activity SCMU, either interactively, from a response file, or via Python. It must then be referenced using one of the following procedures: (a) One reference with APIOPT=1, followed by any number of references with APIOPT=2, followed by one reference with APIOPT=3. (b) One reference with APIOPT=0. This automatically combines the processing of one APIOPT 1 reference, followed by one APIOPT 2 reference, followed by one APIOPT 3 reference. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = scop(sid, all, units, apiopt)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier; used only when apiopt is 0 or 2 and all is 0. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag; used only when apiopt is 0 or 2. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: units
parameters.description: Branch quantity flag; used only when apiopt is 0 or 2. (input; 1 by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

apiopt.description: initialize for short circuit output, produce the output, and run post-processing clean up.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
SCMU results error; one of the these occurred: No SCMU results file is open; SCMU results are not compatible with the working case; Error reading the SCMU results file.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
